answer:
\boxed{D}  

The Audi A8 uses a permanent all-wheel drive system (Torsen or Quattro with self-locking center differential), not a Haldex-based system. In contrast, the Audi TT, S3, and A3 are based on a transverse engine layout and typically use Haldex-style on-demand all-wheel drive. Therefore, the A8 is the correct answer.
